summary: The author provides a preliminary link to their first-place solution notebook, noting that a detailed writeup and cleaned code will be released in a few days. The shared notebook contains configuration visualizations and the underlying implementation, though the author explicitly warns that the code is currently difficult to follow. Readers are advised to wait for the official writeup and code cleanup to fully understand the approach.
extensive_summary:
This post functions as a placeholder and preview for a first-place Kaggle competition solution. Rather than detailing the methodology immediately, the author directs readers to a linked notebook that contains configuration visualizations and the raw codebase.

The author acknowledges that the current code is messy and difficult to navigate, recommending that the community wait for a forthcoming detailed writeup and cleaned repository. The post serves primarily as an announcement to manage expectations while the author prepares the final technical breakdown.

No technical specifics, model architectures, or pipeline details are disclosed in this preview. The focus is entirely on directing interested readers to the preliminary code and setting the stage for a comprehensive follow-up.

## Next Steps
The author indicates that a proper writeup and cleaned codebase will be shared shortly, at which point the full technical approach, configurations, and insights will be available for review.

other_solution_refs.description: Kaggle notebook containing configurations and raw code for the 1st place solution
